# Remove an INTERNAL key — after remove(50) from remove_slide_start.txt.
# Order m=3.
#
# 50 lives in the root (internal). Its left child [30] has only the minimum,
# but the right child [60,70] can spare a key, so 50 is replaced by its
# in-order successor (55, the smallest key in the right subtree) and 55 is then
# removed from leaf f=[55,58], leaving [58]. Exercises getSuccessorKey().
#
#                       [55]
#                     /      \
#                 [30]        [60,70]
#                /    \      /   |    \
#            [10]   [40]  [58]  [65] [75,80]
root 1
1  1  2  55 3
2  1  4  30 5
3  2  6  60 7  70 8
4  1  0  10 0
5  1  0  40 0
6  1  0  58 0
7  1  0  65 0
8  2  0  75 0  80 0
